# Korea Republic 2026 official-summary inputs

These files contain normalized, manually transcribed facts and source metadata, not copied
web pages. Blank fields mean unavailable or not yet verified; they must not be converted to
zero. FIFA sources are primary. The `verification_status` field distinguishes verified,
approximate, unavailable, and conflicting records.

Match duration is an analysis input, not a FIFA match statistic. `KOR-CZE-2026` is derived
from the official full-time report. The other two durations use a documented secondary
cross-check of six added minutes because an official full-time report was not retrievable;
their status remains `approximate`.
